summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SafeScan AI cybersecurity assistant. Backend APIs working well (7/9 tests passed), frontend UI excellent with dark cybersecurity theme and full functionality (9/10 features working). AI analysis integration successful with GPT-4o-mini.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 422 for short input instead of expected 400
minor_issues.impact: Validation works but status code inconsistent

minor_issues.issue: Rate limiting not functioning - allowed 12 rapid requests without 429 response
minor_issues.impact: Could allow abuse of AI API calls

ui_bugs.issue: Clear history button confirmation works but history items not refreshed in UI

passed_tests: Page loads with dark cybersecurity theme
Example buttons (LOG, CODE, EMAIL) load correct content
ANALYZE PAYLOAD button with loading state
AI analysis returns structured results (risk level, explanation, fixes)
COPY results to clipboard with toast notification
AI integration with GPT-4o-mini via Emergent LLM
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix rate limiting implementation in backend (currently not working), and fix clear history UI refresh issue in frontend. Both are medium priority issues that don't break core functionality.
